top_findings.title: No date-range filtering — only season (year) filter implemented
top_findings.evidence: src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/data.clj:186 search-matches accepts :season (integer year) but has no :start-date/:end-date params; src/brazilian_soccer_mcp/tools.clj:33-37 search_matches inputSchema has season but no date-range fields; TASK.md:157-159 lists 'By date range' and 'By season' as separate filter capabilities
top_findings.suggestion: Add :date-from and :date-to keyword params to search-matches and expose date_start/date_end in the search_matches tool inputSchema
